description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Stress Benchmark that runs on push to specific paths and branches, and on pull requests to specific paths and branches. The workflow requires write permissions for repository contents and deployments. It consists of two jobs: check_actor and benchmark. The check_actor job uses a reusable workflow from ultimaker/cura-workflows, while the benchmark job uses another reusable workflow with custom inputs for a stress benchmark, including a specific command, output file, and data directory.
